ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "trade_number" INTEGER /* Sequential number for the trade */,
  "buy_gate" REAL /* Gate price for buying cryptocurrency */,
  "buy_bith" REAL /* Value in Bith for the buy gate */,
  "sell_gate" REAL /* Gate price for selling cryptocurrency */,
  "sell_bith" REAL /* Value in Bith for the sell gate */,
  "diff_sell" REAL /* Difference in selling price */,
  "diff_buy" REAL /* Difference in buying price */,
  "time_server" TEXT /* Timestamp from the server when the trade was logged */,
  "time_gate" TEXT /* Timestamp for the gate price */,
  "time_bith" TEXT /* Timestamp for the Bith price */,
  "percent_bonus" REAL /* Percentage bonus applied to the trade */,
  "buy_or_sell_gate" INTEGER /* Indicator for buy/sell action at the gate */,
  "buy_or_sell_bith" INTEGER /* Indicator for buy/sell action in Bith */,
  "init" INTEGER /* Initialization flag */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the exchange where the trade was executed */,
  "crypto_pair" TEXT /* Cryptocurrency pair being traded (e.g., BTC/USD) */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, executed, canceled) */,
  "trade_fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the trade */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key used for the trade (for audit purposes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for verification and communication */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicator if the user's account is verified */,
  "kyc_status" TEXT /* Know Your Customer (KYC) status of the user */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Referral code for marketing purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trade associated with this market data */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Cryptocurrency identifier (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "market_price" REAL /* Current market price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market price data */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the exchange where the market data is from */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume at the time of the market data */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency during the time period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency during the time period */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency during the time period */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency during the time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_balances" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balance record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user owning this balance */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Cryptocurrency identifier (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of cryptocurrency held by the user */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the balance was last updated */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the exchange where the balance is held */,
  "available_balance" REAL /* Available balance for trading */,
  "locked_balance" REAL /* Balance locked in pending trades */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_balances_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the transaction */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated trade */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of cryptocurrency traded */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (buy/sell) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the transaction */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the exchange where the transaction was executed */,
  "transaction_fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the alert */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Cryptocurrency identifier (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "alert_price" REAL /* Price at which the alert will trigger */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator if the alert is currently active */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the exchange where the alert is set */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of alert checks (e.g., every 5 minutes) */,
  "alert_channel" TEXT /* Channel for alert notifications (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the trade */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated trade */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trade occurred */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the exchange where the trade was executed */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, executed, canceled) */,
  "trade_fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the trade */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key used for the trade (for audit purposes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
